case_title: BIBO PEI ZHU YU VS ZHU GUO MING et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BIBO PEI ZHU YU AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU GUO MING WONG YUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
INVALID SERVICE AS TO ?, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHU GUO MING WONG YUN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BIBO PEI ZHU YU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BIBO PEI ZHU YU
POS ON SUBPOENA TO YING ZHANG FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIBO PEI ZHU YU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHU GUO MING WONG YUN $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ZHU GUO MING WONG YUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BIBO PEI ZHU YU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU GUO MING WONG YUN
